regional_cost_note: Cladding installers in Whangārei typically charge $125–$190/m² for primed pine weatherboard, $105–$170/m² for fibre cement, and $190–$295/m² for brick veneer. Northland rates are broadly in line with the national average, with some capacity constraints for specialist trades. Weathertightness is critical — use only licensed builders for restricted building work on cladding.
